plugins.name: norma
plugins.description: Norma — Maldonado UY zoning toolkit (TONE / Digesto Departamental, Volumen V). Dispatcher /norma routes to sub-skills: /norma-analyze (envelope analysis) + /norma-informe (printable A4 HTML report). Includes shared rules (envelope contract, disclaimer, units, terminology), a marker-driven disclaimer hook, and a structural lint.
